summary: Aspiring Embedded/Firmware Engineer with hands-on experience in C/C++ firmware development, UART protocol, STM32 and ESP32 microcontrollers, IoT sensor integration, and PCB debug through internships at Synopsys, Nvidia, and Jabil, plus academic projects including a smart irrigation system based on ESP-32. Strong foundation in digital design, scripting, and testbench development, committed to delivering reliable firmware solutions.

experience.title: Technical Engineer Apprentice
bullets: Developed a UART transactor for the Zebu emulator using C++ to support firmware-level protocol testing.
Enhanced protocol functionality of Zebu transactors in C++, improving compatibility and test coverage.

experience.title: ASIC Engineer Intern (here)
bullets: Achieved timing closure and optimized performance of advanced SoC designs through static timing analysis (STA).
Created Perl scripts to automate STA report analysis, streamlining validation workflows.

experience.company: Jabil Circuit India Private Limited Pune
experience.title: Test Engineer Intern (here)
bullets: Performed working, debugging, and testing of Ericsson’s 5G radio transceiver (AIR3268), validating hardware functionality.
Executed SMT process for Ericsson AIR 3268 transceiver PCBA, contributing to PCB assembly and bring-up.
Set up, measured, and calibrated Keysight test equipment for accurate hardware verification.

projects.name: Smart Irrigation System
bullets: Led a group to develop an IoT-based smart irrigation system for flood-irrigated paddy fields.
Implemented the system using an ESP-32 microcontroller, nRF24L01 RF module, GSM SIM800A, BME280 sensor, and Thingspeak IoT Cloud.
Worked on water conservation by automating water flow and alerting the farmer about the weather.

projects.name: Development and Implementation of a 5G Modem using an FPGA Board
bullets: Implemented FM broadcast and radio functionality using an Adalm-Pluto SDR platform.
Conducted hardware-in-the-loop simulation of FFT algorithms on a Kintex-7 KC705 FPGA development board.

education.institution: THAPAR INSTITUTE OF ENGINEERING AND TECHNOLOGY Patiala
